text:
THGHT_BETTER_DD_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Thoughts of better off dead: P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient said they had thoughts that they would be better off dead, or of hurting themselves in some way. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
510 THGHT_BETTER_DD_FREQ_ADMSN_CD THGHT_BETTER_DD_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Thoughts of better off dead: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with
